summary.intent: Clean up the legacy Session table and hook handler code from Gossamer, then build out search result navigation with scroll-to, highlight, and auto-expand features in the UI.
summary.outcome: Fully removed the hook handler (handler.ts, index.ts), all legacy DB tables (Session, AgentParent, PendingToolUse, Event, and v1 Checkpoint tables), and implemented per-commit git user attribution. Added search-result scroll-to with inline term highlighting, collapsible thinking blocks, and selective tool-call expansion in the session detail view.

repo: FTS5 virtual tables must be dropped manually via sqlite3 before prisma db push — Prisma cannot handle them, causing push to fail every time schema changes are made.
The indexer poll loop resets to the local branch tip by default; it must explicitly reset to origin/${CHECKPOINT_BRANCH} after a successful fetch to pick up remote changes.
logEventsToEvents creates synthetic events with negative IDs; the real LogEvent.id must be threaded through as _sourceLogEventId for DOM targeting to work.
ClaudeTurnCard renders thinking, text, and tool_use content — thinking was previously filtered out entirely in logEventsToEvents and never shown in the UI.

gitUserName/gitUserEmail should come from CheckpointMetadata (populated from git commit author at index time via findCommitForCheckpoint), not local git config, since multiple users contribute checkpoints.
The Mantine ScrollArea component uses its own internal viewport div — window.scrollIntoView() has no effect; must use viewportRef and manual scroll calculations.
ToolGroupItem has two levels of nesting: top-level group toggle and individual ToolUseItem toggles — both need separate autoExpand control.

code.finding: logEventsToEvents must accumulate all assistant log event IDs per turn (including thinking-only events) in currentTurnLogEventIds, then attach them to the Stop event as _extraSourceLogEventIds so that thinking search hits route to the correct card.
HighlightCode children must be typed as string, not ReactNode — Glob/Grep cases pass two JSX children causing text.split to fail at runtime.

Scroll-to-mark for ClaudeTurn requires two-phase timing: set highlightActive at 150ms (triggers mark render + Collapse open), then scroll to first <mark> via requestAnimationFrame after a 250ms Collapse animation delay.
Search snippets use «» markers to delimit matched terms — these must be stripped before passing clean text to MarkdownView with highlightTerms for proper markdown rendering with highlights.
MarkdownView uses a custom parser with React context — highlight terms can be injected via context and applied to text leaf nodes by splitting on matched terms and wrapping in <mark>.

workflow: When Prisma schema removes FTS5 tables, always drop them manually with sqlite3 first, then run prisma db push.
After pkill -f for server processes, verify with lsof -i :PORT that nothing is still listening — old processes can survive pkill if the pattern doesn't match the actual command string.
For multi-phase UI scroll effects (expand then scroll), use separate setTimeout + requestAnimationFrame to ensure layout is complete before measuring element positions.
contentType from the search result should be passed through router navigation state so the session detail page can selectively expand only the relevant section (thinking vs tool_use).

friction: FTS5 tables blocking prisma db push occurred twice across the session, requiring manual sqlite3 drops each time.
Old handler.js process survived pkill -f and kept port 3000 occupied, requiring lsof + explicit kill by PID.
Server was accidentally started from the app/ subdirectory after a type-check cd, causing 'Missing script' error.
First scroll implementation used window scrollIntoView which silently does nothing inside a Mantine ScrollArea viewport.
Scroll-to-mark fired too early before Collapse animations settled, reporting wrong bounding rect positions for ClaudeTurn content.
ClaudeTurnCard's targetLogEventId reference caused ReferenceError because it was in SessionDetail scope but accessed inside ClaudeTurnCard without being passed as a prop.
HighlightCode received ReactNode children (JSX array) from Glob/Grep render paths instead of a string, causing runtime text.split crash.
open_items: Live DB still has old tables (Session, AgentParent, PendingToolUse, Event, v1 Checkpoint tables) — they will be dropped on the next prisma db push with --accept-data-loss.

CheckpointMetadata.gitUserName/gitUserEmail is only populated when the indexer runs saveGitOidMapping — shadow sessions without a linked commit fall back to local git config, which is incorrect for multi-user repos.

User message text (EventItem/UserPromptCard) now highlights matched terms, but tool_result content inside ToolUseItem uses HighlightCode which only handles plain text — rich structured outputs (JSON, diffs) may not highlight correctly in all cases.
Thinking section auto-expands on scroll but is still collapsed by default — users who want to see thinking without a search hit have to expand manually each time.
